title: March 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 2''' is the 61st day of the year (62nd in leap years). There are 304 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Mark Evanier]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Jon Bon Jovi]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Daniel Craig]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Giuseppe Camuncoli]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Bryce Dallas Howard]] is born.
*1981 – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[A Wind to Shake the Stars]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 89|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 89]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Anthony Lang]] dies.
*1992 – [[Maisie Richardson-Sellers]] is born.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3]]'' published.
*[[2011]] –''[[The Old Republic: The Third Lesson]]'' published in [[Star Wars Insider 124|''Star Wars Insider'' 124]].
*[[2012]] – "[[Bounty (episode)|Bounty]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – "[[The Wrong Jedi]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2015]] – "[[Fire Across the Galaxy]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2016]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 17|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 17]] published.
*2016 – "[[Shroud of Darkness]]" aired on Disney XD.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Victory's Price: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker Graphic Novel Adaptation]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Boba Fett and Other Characters of the Underworld]]'' published in French.
*[[2022]] – [[Alan Ladd, Jr.]] dies.
*2022 – [[The High Republic (2021) 15|''The High Republic'' (2021) 15]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Eye of the Storm 2|''The High Republic: Eye of the Storm'' 2]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars (2020) 21|''Star Wars'' (2020) 21]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Mark Dodson]] dies.
<noinclude>
